message:
feat: Add runtime static library for faster test compilation

- Fix buildRuntimeArchive() to include proper module flags (-M and --dep)
- Add ensureRuntimeArchive() call to cmdTest() to build/cache runtime once
- Add compileWithRuntimeArchive() for linking against prebuilt .a file
- Tests now link against cached libruntime.a instead of recompiling 236K LOC

Build flow:
1. First run: compile runtime.zig → libruntime.a (~1-2s, cached)
2. Each test: link against libruntime.a (~1.4s vs 2-3s full compile)

Cache invalidation:
- Runtime archive rebuilds if runtime.zig is newer
- Test binaries rebuild if .zig or compiler is newer
